title: Lively by Alexio
description: A warm, nature-focused vanilla-style resource pack. Custom water, skies, and foliage colormaps. Subtle but impactful. ✨
body:
# 🌿 Lively — Because vanilla was looking a little dead
You know that feeling when you boot up Minecraft and everything looks just a tiny bit... grey? A little flat? Like the game forgot to eat its vegetables?  
### **Lively by Alexio fixes that.**  
This pack takes the vanilla aesthetic and turns up the warmth — golden sunlight filtering through leaves, water that actually looks like it wants to be swum in, and a sky that makes you stop mining for a second just to look up.
It's subtle. It's clean. It's the kind of pack you forget you're using — until you take it off and suddenly everything feels wrong.
What's different:

**🌊 Custom water textures (flowing & still)**

**☀️ A sun that actually looks like a sun**

**🌿 Richer grass & foliage colormaps**

**🌌 Custom skies, starfields & lightmaps (requires OptiFine or Iris)**

Low effort to install. High impact on vibes.
Give your world the glow-up it deserves.
